```{r}
#   , "fl_cyto_csf_il_6"
#   , "fl_cyto_csf_il_8"
#   , "fl_cyto_csf_tnf_a"
#   , "fl_cyto_plasma_ifn_g"
#   , "fl_cyto_plasma_il_10"
#   , "fl_cyto_plasma_il_12p70"
#   , "fl_cyto_plasma_il_13"
#   , "fl_cyto_plasma_il_1b"
#   , "fl_cyto_plasma_il_2"
#   , "fl_cyto_plasma_il_4"
#   , "fl_cyto_plasma_il_6"
#   , "fl_cyto_plasma_il_8"
#   , "fl_cyto_plasma_tnf_a"
#   , "fl_msd_csf_mmp_1"
#   , "fl_msd_csf_mmp_10"
#   , "fl_msd_csf_mmp_2"
#   , "fl_msd_csf_mmp_3"
#   , "fl_msd_csf_mmp_9"
#   , "fl_msd_plasma_mmp_1"
#   , "fl_msd_plasma_mmp_10"
#   , "fl_msd_plasma_mmp_2"
#   , "fl_msd_plasma_mmp_3"
#   , "fl_msd_plasma_mmp_9"
#   , "fl_simoa_csf_n2pb_gfap"
#   , "fl_simoa_csf_n2pb_nfl"
#   , "fl_simoa_csf_n4pe_nfl"
#   , "fl_simoa_csf_nfl"
#   , "fl_simoa_csf_plgf"
#   , "fl_simoa_edta_plasma_n4pe_nfl"
#   , "fl_simoa_edta_plasma_nfl"
#   , "fl_simoa_edta_plasma_plgf"
#   , "fl_simoa_heparin_plasma_n4pe_nfl"
#   , "fl_simoa_heparin_plasma_nfl"
#   , "fl_simoa_heparin_plasma_plgf"
#   , "fl_simoa_plasma_n2pb_gfap"
#   )
#
# var_VCI_Sweden_different_list
```

```{r}

# # remove different variables from lists
# for (n_var_list in var_groups) {
#   Var[["list"]][[ n_var_list ]] <-
#     Var[["list"]][[ n_var_list ]][ Var[["list"]][[ n_var_list ]] %notin% var_VCI_Sweden_different_list ]
# }
```

## --------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Random forest, which fluid variable help predict DX

-   Keep observations with at least 50% of the variables non-NA
-   Impute the missing values

```{r chunk-044}
library(doParallel)  # for %dopar% operator
num_cores <- 6 # length(var_groups)
#num_cores <- parallel::detectCores() - 2
doParallel::registerDoParallel(num_cores)

tictoc::tic(msg = "Timer") # start timer

## don't prespecify outer "results" list

results <-
  foreach::foreach(
    n_var_group = var_groups
  #, .combine =                             # default is a list
  , .inorder = TRUE                         # FALSE is faster
  , .packages = c("erikmisc", "tidyverse", "labelled", "patchwork", "randomForestSRC")  # character vector of packages that the tasks depend on
  , .export = NULL                          # character vector of variables to export
  #) %do% # sequential
  ) %dopar%  # parallel
  {

#out_rf_results <- list()
#for (n_var_group in var_groups) {
  ## n_var_group = var_groups[1]

  this_result <- list()
  #out_rf_results[[ n_var_group ]] <- list()
  for (n_dx_group in dx_groups) {
    ## n_dx_group = dx_groups[5]
    this_result[[ n_dx_group ]] <- list()
    #out_rf_results[[ n_var_group ]][[ n_dx_group ]] <- list()

    text_var_dx <- paste0(n_var_group, ",  ", n_dx_group)

    print("")
    print("")
    print("")
    print(paste0(
      "RF Training:  "
    , n_var_group
    , ",  "
    , n_dx_group
    , "  ########################################"
    ))


    dat_rf_class <-
      dat_sub |>
      dplyr::select(
        tidyselect::all_of(n_dx_group)
      , tidyselect::all_of(Var[["list"]][[ n_var_group ]])
      ) |>
      dplyr::rename(
        "dx_current" = n_dx_group
      ) |>
      dplyr::rowwise() |>
      dplyr::mutate(
        prop_complete = mean(!is.na(dplyr::across(tidyselect::everything())))
      ) |>
      dplyr::ungroup() |>
      dplyr::filter(
        # keep observations where at least 50% have data across columns
        prop_complete >= 0.50
      #, dx_current %notin% "Sweden"
      , !is.na(dx_current)
      ) |>
      dplyr::select(
        -prop_complete
      ) |>
      dplyr::mutate(
        dx_current = dx_current |> forcats::fct_drop()
      ) |>
      as.data.frame()

    col_prop_complete <- colMeans(!is.na(dat_rf_class))

    dat_rf_class <-
      dat_rf_class |>
      dplyr::select(
        dx_current
        # keep variables where at least 50% have data across observations (already filtered)
      ,  tidyselect::all_of( names(col_prop_complete)[col_prop_complete >= 0.50] )
      )

    dim(dat_rf_class)
    table(dat_rf_class[, 1])

    # missing either diagnosis or predictor variables, skip
    if (ncol(dat_rf_class) < 2) {
      out_rf_results[[ n_var_group ]][[ n_dx_group ]] <- NA
      next
    }


    # dat_miss_impute_fast <-
    #   randomForestSRC::impute(
    #     data      = dat_rf_class
    #   )
    ## Random Forest Slow imputation mode is more accurate
    #    uses randomForestSRC::rfsrc(na.action = "na.impute")
    o_dat_rf_class_impute <-
      randomForestSRC::rfsrc(
        data      = dat_rf_class
      , na.action = "na.impute"
      )

    ind_row_impute <-
      which(!complete.cases(o_dat_rf_class_impute$xvar))

    dat_rf_class_impute <-
      o_dat_rf_class_impute$xvar
    dat_rf_class_impute[ ind_row_impute, ] <-
      o_dat_rf_class_impute$imputed.data


    #dat_rf_class

    p1 <-
      e_plot_missing(
        dat_plot       = dat_rf_class
      , var_group      = "dx_current"
      , sw_group_sort  = TRUE
      #, var2_sort      = "prop_complete"
      )
    p2 <-
      e_plot_missing(
        dat_plot       = dat_rf_class_impute
      , var_group      = "dx_current"
      , sw_group_sort  = TRUE
      #, var2_sort      = "prop_complete"
      )

    p_arranged <-
      cowplot::plot_grid(
        plotlist  = list(p1, p2)
      , nrow      = 1
      #, ncol      = 2
      , labels    = "AUTO"
      )

    #p_arranged %>% print()

    this_result[[ n_dx_group ]][[ "plot_missing" ]] <-
    #out_rf_results[[ n_var_group ]][[ n_dx_group ]][[ "plot_missing" ]] <-
      p_arranged

    ggsave(
        paste0("out/plot_rf_train__", n_dx_group, "_-_", n_var_group, "__missing",  ".png")
      , plot   = p_arranged
      , width  = 12
      , height = 8
      ## png, jpeg
      , dpi    = 300
      , bg     = "white"
      ## pdf
      #, units  = "in"
      #, useDingbats = FALSE
      )


    # Perform RF
    out_e_rf <-
      e_rfsrc_classification(
        dat_rf_class    = dat_rf_class_impute
      , rf_y_var        = NULL  # if not specified, assumed to be first column
      , rf_x_var        = NULL  # if not specified, assumed to be second through last columns
      , sw_rfsrc_ntree  = 1000
      , sw_alpha        = 0.20  # for subsample bootsample model selection and VIMP plot
      )

    this_result[[ n_dx_group ]][[ "out_e_rf" ]] <-
    #out_rf_results[[ n_var_group ]][[ n_dx_group ]][[ "out_e_rf" ]] <-
      out_e_rf

    # # Compile summary plot
    # text_formula <-
    #   paste(as.character(out_e_rf$rf_formula)[c(2, 1, 3)], collapse = " ")
    #   #|>
    #   #stringr::str_wrap(width = 60)
    #
    # library(patchwork)
    # plot_design <-
    #   "AAAABB
    #    AAAABB
    #    CCCCDD
    #    CCCCDD
    #    EEEEEE
    #    EEEEEE"
    #
    # # If selected model has x variables
    # if (length(out_e_rf$rf_x_var_sel)) {
    #   #this_result[[ n_dx_group ]][[ "plot_rf_train_all_summary" ]] <-
    #   out_rf_results[[ n_var_group ]][[ n_dx_group ]][[ "plot_rf_train_all_summary" ]] <-
    #     cowplot::plot_grid(out_e_rf$plot_o_class              ) +
    #     cowplot::plot_grid(out_e_rf$plot_o_class_subsample    ) +
    #     cowplot::plot_grid(out_e_rf$plot_o_class_sel          ) +
    #     cowplot::plot_grid(out_e_rf$plot_o_class_sel_subsample) +
    #     cowplot::plot_grid(plotlist = out_e_rf$plot_o_class_sel_ROC$plot_roc, nrow = 1) +
    #     plot_layout(design = plot_design) +
    #     plot_annotation(
    #       title       = text_var_dx
    #     , subtitle    = text_formula
    #     , caption     = paste0("Overall AUC = ", round(out_e_rf$o_class_sel_AUC, 3))
    #     , tag_levels  = "A"
    #     )
    # } else {
    #   #this_result[[ n_dx_group ]][[ "plot_rf_train_all_summary" ]] <-
    #   out_rf_results[[ n_var_group ]][[ n_dx_group ]][[ "plot_rf_train_all_summary" ]] <-
    #     cowplot::plot_grid(out_e_rf$plot_o_class              ) +
    #     cowplot::plot_grid(out_e_rf$plot_o_class_subsample    ) +
    #     #cowplot::plot_grid(out_e_rf$plot_o_class_sel          ) +
    #     #cowplot::plot_grid(out_e_rf$plot_o_class_sel_subsample) +
    #     #cowplot::plot_grid(plotlist = out_e_rf$plot_o_class_sel_ROC$plot_roc, nrow = 1) +
    #     plot_spacer() +
    #     plot_spacer() +
    #     plot_spacer() +
    #     plot_layout(design = plot_design) +
    #     plot_annotation(
    #       title       = text_var_dx
    #     , subtitle    = text_formula
    #     , caption     = "No x variables selected"
    #     , tag_levels  = "A"
    #     )
    # }

    ggsave(
        paste0("out/plot_rf_train__", n_dx_group, "_-_", n_var_group, "__all_summary",  ".png")
      , plot   = this_result[[ n_dx_group ]][[ "out_e_rf" ]][[ "plot_rf_train_all_summary" ]]
      #, plot   = out_rf_results[[ n_var_group ]][[ n_dx_group ]][[ "out_e_rf" ]][[ "plot_rf_train_all_summary" ]]
      , width  = 16
      , height = 16
      ## png, jpeg
      , dpi    = 300
      , bg     = "white"
      ## pdf
      #, units  = "in"
      #, useDingbats = FALSE
      )

    out_save <-
      this_result[[ n_dx_group ]]
      #out_rf_results[[ n_var_group ]][[ n_dx_group ]]

    save(
      out_save
    , file = paste0("out/RData__", n_dx_group, "_-_", n_var_group, "__results", ".RData")
    )

    ## Do not save result
    this_result[[ n_dx_group ]] <-
    #out_rf_results[[ n_var_group ]][[ n_dx_group ]] <-
      NULL

  } # n_dx_group
#} # n_var_group

  return(this_result)
} # foreach

tictoc::toc() # end timer

# explicitly close the implicitly created cluster
doParallel::stopImplicitCluster()


#save.image(
#    file = "out/RF_Trained.RData"
#  )

```

# Predictions

```{r}

## load(
##   "out/RData__var_fl_all_-_dx_current_ADSIVDMX_Control.RData"
## )
##
## dat_to_pred <-
##   dat_sub |>
##   dplyr::filter(
##     I_Sweden
##   ) |>
##   dplyr::select(
##     ID
##   , tidyselect::all_of(out_save$out_e_rf$o_class_sel$xvar.names)
##   ) |>
##   tidyr::drop_na()
##
##
## out_save$out_e_rf$o_class_sel
##
## out_e_rf_pred <-
##   predict(
##     object        = out_save$out_e_rf$o_class_sel
##   , newdata       = dat_sub |> dplyr::filter(I_Sweden)
##   )
##
## out_e_rf_pred$predicted
## out_e_rf_pred$class
##
## dat_to_pred <-
##   dat_to_pred |>
##   dplyr::bind_cols(
##     out_e_rf_pred$predicted
##   , tibble::tibble(class = out_e_rf_pred$class)
##   ) |>
##   dplyr::select(
##     ID
##   , class
##   , tidyselect::all_of(colnames(out_e_rf_pred$predicted))
##   , tidyselect::everything()
##   )
##
## readr::write_csv(
##     dat_to_pred
##   , file = "out/dat_Sweden_pred__var_fl_all_-_dx_current_ADSIVDMX_Control.csv"
##   )
##
## fl_angio_csf_flt_1
## fl_angio_csf_plgf
## fl_angio_csf_vegf_a
## fl_cyto_csf_il_8
## fl_cyto_plasma_il_6
## fl_cyto_plasma_tnf_a
## fl_msd_csf_mmp_1
## fl_msd_csf_mmp_10
## fl_msd_csf_mmp_9
## fl_msd_plasma_mmp_1
## fl_msd_plasma_mmp_3


```
